recalls.Description: BJ's Wholesale Club has announced a recall of specific Berkley Jensen cedar hard-topped gazebos due to safety concerns. The affected models, which include A102008010, A102008100, A102011920, and A102011902, measure approximately 10 feet by 12 feet or 12 feet by 14 feet. These gazebos are available in copper, which may appear brown, or black, and may come with or without netting panels and tie-back bands. Only the models sold during the specified dates are part of this recall.
recalls.Title: BJ's Wholesale Club Recalls Berkley Jensen Gazebos Due to Injury Risk
recalls.ConsumerContact: Consumers should contact BJ's Wholesale Club at 800-257-2582, available from 8 a.m. to 7 p.m. ET Monday through Friday, 8 a.m. to 6 p.m. ET on Saturdays, and 12 p.m. to 6 p.m. ET on Sundays. They can also email gazebos@bjs.com or visit www.bjs.com/help/recall for further assistance. BJ's Wholesale Club will reach out to all known purchasers directly.

Images.Caption: Recalled Berkley Jensen Gazebo Pavilion – model A102008010
Recalled Berkley Jensen Gazebo Pavilion - model A102008100
Recalled Berkley Jensen Gazebo with Netting - model A102011902
Recalled Berkley Jensen Gazebo – model A102011920

Injuries.Name: BJ's Wholesale Club is aware of at least 137 incidents of panels dislodging from the gazebo's roof, one resulting in minor injuries.

Manufacturers.Name: Lypometal Sdn. Bhd., of Malaysia (Sunjoy Group)

Retailers.Name: Available at BJ's Wholesale Club locations nationwide and online at www.bjs.com from October 20, 2020, to May 30, 2022, priced between $1,300 and $1,800

Importers.Name: BJ's Wholesale Club, of Marlborough, Massachusetts

Hazards.Name: Risk of injury due to dislodging roof panels in high winds

Remedies.Name: Stop using the gazebos, maintain distance, and request a free repair kit to secure roof panels

recalls.metaDescription: BJ's Wholesale Club recalls Berkley Jensen gazebos due to potential injury risks from dislodging roof panels. Contact for free repair kit.
